title: Medicare levy reduction
description: Find out if you are eligible for a Medicare levy reduction based on your income or family income.
keywords: levy reduction, Medicare reduction, Medicare low income, Medicare family income

child_links.title: Medicare levy reduction for low-income earners
child_links.description: A Medicare levy reduction applies if your taxable income is between the thresholds as a single low-income earner.

child_links.title: Medicare levy reduction – family income
child_links.description: Find out if you qualify for a Medicare levy reduction on your family taxable income.
